body.title: CLOSED: Re-register with ADC automatically after ADC restarts
body.result: epoch-based restart detection: started_at in /health, check_server_epoch() in client, poll_loop calls every 10 polls. 85 tests green. d578b3fc
body.description:
When ADC (utility_closet_server) restarts while Igor or the Librarian are running, all agent registrations are lost. The residents' UC clients have is_registered=True in memory but ADC has no record of them. Igor's poll loop keeps running but ADC ignores the polls. Result: Igor and Librarian disappear from the web UI with no recovery attempt and no error visible to the user.

Root cause: uc_client.is_registered is a plain in-memory flag. There is no mechanism to detect that the server it registered with has since restarted.

Fix in two parts:

1. ADC (utility_closet_server.py): Expose _boot_ts as a stable epoch string in /health response: { ..., "started_at": "2026-05-12T17:41:00Z" }. The _boot_ts variable already exists — just add it to the health dict.

2. UC client (utility_closet_client.py): After successful register(), store the server's started_at value. In the poll loop (web/server.py _poll_loop or uc_client itself), periodically (every N polls) hit /health and compare started_at against the stored value. If different: ADC restarted — call register() again to re-establish presence.

Same fix applies to the Librarian's UC client if it uses the same utility_closet_client module; if not, apply the same pattern there.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/utility_closet_server.py (expose started_at in /health), wild_igor/igor/web/utility_closet_client.py (store epoch + detect restart), wild_igor/igor/web/server.py (_poll_loop: periodic epoch check + re-register)
**Design rules:** docs-live-in-code (update utility_closet_client.py module docstring to describe epoch-based reconnect)
**Scope boundary:** Registration recovery only. Does not change the poll interval or message delivery. Does not cover the startup case (that is T-igor-adc-shim and T-cc-adc-shim).
**Test plan:** Unit test: mock /health to return a different started_at than the stored value; verify register() is called again. Integration: start Igor, restart ADC manually, confirm Igor and Librarian reappear in the web UI within 2 poll cycles without any manual restart.
